allowed_values: Unclear; None; free-text canonical label from source resource/cohort name
purpose: Groups rows that belong to the same upstream cohort/resource without forcing parent-child logic.
Links a component row to an aggregate row already present in data/ibd_omics_datasets.csv. Use only when the parent is a dataset row, not just an external resource.
Prevents overcounting. TRUE for distinct source cohorts; FALSE for aggregate portals/resources or duplicate assay-layer rows from the same cohort; Unclear when overlap needs review.
Human-readable explanation of why a row is independent, aggregate-only, overlapping, or uncertain.
